manual_gsc_value: Qasem reports 0 impressions in last 24h (GSC web UI)
api_value: 77 impressions over 7 days (May 29 - Jun 5), 0 in last data point
root_cause: GSC API data IS consistent with web UI. The 0-in-24h is likely GSC reporting lag — GSC typically has 2-3 day delay. The last data point in the API pull ends at 'yesterday' (Jun 5). GSC web UI may not yet show Jun 5 data or may have filtered to a shorter window. The 7-day API pull shows 77 impressions — the daily average is ~11. A single zero day within the 7-day window is expected for a sandboxed domain.
